prompt: 我正在做一个 Toggle 开关组件，它有自己的 isOn 状态，点击可以切换。父组件需要知道 toggle 的状态变化来更新其他 UI。请帮我实现 Toggle 组件和父组件的通信。

assertions.text: Toggle does NOT use useEffect to call onChange/onToggle after state change
onChange is called in the same event handler as setIsOn (or component is fully controlled with no local state)
Component is either fully controlled (parent owns isOn) or updates parent in the click handler (not via Effect)
Includes both Toggle component and a parent component demonstrating the communication pattern
